scope: PSFS filesystem: container, journal, compaction, fsck, fuse mount, CLI tooling
overview: Built out PSFS as a journaled, mountable container with incremental compaction, fsck repair/diagnostics, and durability/perf tuning controls. Added unified CLI commands and documentation updates.
major_features: PSFS pack/unpack/verify with dir + symlink support
PSFJ journal overlay (file/dir/symlink/delete) with optional compression
Conflict policy: newest (mtime_ns, append order) wins; recursive deletes mask older entries
Compaction with incremental mode (since-ns), journal truncation, and watermark automation
FSCK validation with conflict diagnostics and repair-to-new-journal
FUSE write support with caching, readahead, CRC checks, and journal write stats on unmount
Durability knobs: fsync per write or every N records; compression heuristics
Unified CLI with journal max-mtime/stats and extended compact/fsck/mount flags
tests_run: pack/unpack/verify on temp dirs with empty dirs + symlinks
FUSE mounts with journal overlay (read + write ops)
open_decisions: fsck in-place repair vs copy-out default
journal durability defaults (sync cadence vs buffered)
next_steps: Add in-place fsck repair with optional backups
Add benchmark script for journal sync cadence + compression thresholds
